Key Finding
The states with the highest agency density (CA, TX, FL) are also the states with the highest breach counts. The correlation is roughly linear. But the per-agency breach rate varies significantly: Massachusetts has 0.86 breaches per agency. Ohio has 0.27.
@salamituns | Data: HHS OCR + CMS Provider Data | github.com/salamituns
